input.command:
python3 -c "
import csv
with open('/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/opencode_aljazeeraQ12026v37_qwen36plus/26-05-02-00-01-06/agents/minimalHarness_qwen_qwen36-plus_001/workspace/market.csv') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)

for r in rows:
    rd = r.get('resolution_date','').strip()
    if rd and rd == '2026-02-28':
        print(f'QID: {r[\"qid\"]}')
        print(f'Title: {r[\"title\"]}')
        print(f'Background: {r[\"background\"][:300] if r[\"background\"] else \"N/A\"}')
        print('---')
"

blocks.content:
QID: 13213
Title: Which Israeli town will report nine deaths from an Iranian missile strike by March 1, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-21. Iran and Israel are in an active confrontation, and missile attacks could cause civilian casualties in Israeli population centers.
---
QID: 172888
Title: Who will be named the third member of Iran’s temporary three-member governing council by March 2, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-22. Iran has constitutional mechanisms for temporary governance during a leadership crisis. If an interim ruling council is publicly formed, observers will watch closely to see which senior cleric is chosen for its final seat.
---
QID: 354370
Title: What missile will the United States first launch from HIMARS against Iranian targets by 31 March 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-01. HIMARS is a mobile US rocket and missile launcher. During active conflicts, a specific missile type can make its first combat use and later be identified in official statements or major reporting.
---
QID: 468437
Title: Who will be identified by March 15, 2026, as the captain of Iran’s women’s football team who withdraws her asylum request in Australia?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-21. Iran’s women’s national football team is competing in the AFC Women’s Asian Cup in Australia during a period of political turmoil and concern about the safety of returning to Iran. Team members and staff may face decisions about whether to stay abroad or return home.
---
QID: 59501
Title: Which Gulf country will be described by March 18, 2026, as receiving more than half of Iran’s missiles and drones fired at Gulf countries?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-27. As the regional war expands, several Gulf countries are at risk of missile and drone spillover, and one country may emerge as the main target of those attacks.
---
QID: 599755
Title: Which hospital will be reported as hit by airstrikes in Tehran by March 2, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-23. Military strikes in conflict zones can damage civilian infrastructure, including medical facilities. This question asks which specific hospital name will later appear in reporting about such an incident in Tehran.
---
QID: 635419
Title: Which Guardian Council member will serve on Iran’s interim leadership council in March 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-20. Iran’s constitution provides for a temporary leadership arrangement if the office of supreme leader becomes vacant. One seat in that arrangement can go to a member of the Guardian Council until a successor is chosen.
---
QID: 768218
Title: Whose killing will Hezbollah say its attack is avenging, by March 2, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-13. Hezbollah sometimes says its military actions are responses to the killing of allied leaders during regional conflict. This question asks which person Hezbollah would explicitly name as the reason for an attack before early March 2026.
---
QID: 70713
Title: What country will be reported as the base location of the US troops killed in Iranian strikes by March 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-17. US forces are stationed at several military sites across the Gulf region. If American personnel are killed in retaliatory attacks, the country where they were based would be an important operational detail.
---
QID: 80868
Title: What village will be named by March 8, 2026, in Palestinian reports as the site of an overnight settler attack near Ramallah that kills two Palestinians?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-21. Violence involving Israeli settlers, Palestinian residents, and Israeli forces continues in the occupied West Bank. In the coming days, Palestinian officials and news services may identify the village involved in any deadly overnight attack near Ramallah.
---
QID: 917339
Title: What conflict will Iranian officials cite as the reason for seeking a 2026 World Cup venue change by March 17, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-20. Armed conflict and security concerns can affect whether national teams are willing or able to travel for major international sporting events.
---
